description.value:
[1 action] Archetype, Concentrate

You stretch a leg in a wide sweeping arc. Make a melee Strike against each creature in a 15-foot line starting from an adjacent square. Use the same attack roll against all targets. Each creature struck must succeed at a DC equal to (10 + your level + your Strength modifier) Reflex save or be knocked prone.

Suppressed while Sea-Bound.
